query: SELECT c.id as cid, c.name, c.role as c_role, c.managedProgramId, u.id as uid, u.name as u_name, u.consultorId, u.programId, u.role as u_role FROM consultors c LEFT JOIN users u ON LOWER(u.email) = LOWER(c.email) WHERE c.role = 'gerente' ORDER BY c.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT c.id as cid, c.name, c.role as c_role, c.managedProgramId, u.id as uid, u.name as u_name, u.consultorId, u.programId, u.role as u_role FROM consultors c LEFT JOIN users u ON LOWER(u.email) = LOWER(c.email) WHERE c.role = 'gerente' ORDER BY c.name;
